name: Sales Operations Manager at a mid-sized marketing agency processing 10-20 expense reports/month tool
description: For Sales Operations Manager at a mid-sized marketing agency processing 10-20 expense reports/month, inefficient manual tracking causes delayed reimbursements. We automate expense report generation instead of manual spreadsheet tracking and email approvals.
